name: Herbed Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 Red bell pepper, sliced into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine basil, parsley, tarragon, salt, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Set aside.
2. In a 3-quart microwaveable casserole, combine carrots, green beans, and water. Cover with vented plastic wrap and microwave on high for 6 minutes.
3. Add cauliflower and broccoli to the casserole. Cover and microwave on high for an additional 6 minutes.
4. Drain the vegetables, then add wine and reserved seasonings. Stir, cover, and set aside in the microwave for another minute.
5. In a 2-quart microwaveable casserole, combine mushrooms, zucchini, yellow squash, pattypan squash halves, red bell pepper, and peas. Add olive oil, tossing to coat. Cover and microwave on high for 4 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
6. Stir the mushroom mixture into the carrot mixture. Add radishes, cover, and microwave on high for an additional 4 minutes, or until steaming hot.
